input:
Title: Implement MCP server for AlayaOS
Author: Chloe Weiss
Assignee: Chloe Weiss
Reviewer: Ben Kowalski
Labels: feature, run-1
Milestone: Run 1

Body:
Implement the Model Context Protocol server so that Claude and other AI agents can query the knowledge graph directly.

Scope: tools/entities, tools/claims, tools/search. Authentication via API key.

Depends on: #89 (REST API stabilization by Ben). Target completion: April 20.
